title: LOK BHAVAN HOSTS JOINT FOUNDATION DAY CELEBRATION FOR MIZORAM AND ARUNACHAL PRADESH
content:
524/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 24th February, 2026:Under the 'Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat' initiative, Mizoram Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd), today graced the joint celebration of the Foundation Day of Mizoram and Arunachal Pradesh at the Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan in Aizawl.

In his address, Governor General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh conveyed warm greetings and good wishes to the people of Mizoram and Arunachal Pradesh on their Foundation Day. He acknowledged the remarkable progress made by both states since they attained full statehood. Although endowed with rich biodiversity and a vibrant tribal heritage, the two states had long faced developmental challenges due to difficult geography and other factors. In recent years, however, both Mizoram and Arunachal Pradesh have recorded noticeable advancement in several areas. The Governor highlighted the important role of the younger generation and expressed the hope that continued cooperation, improved connectivity, and progress across various sectors would help integrate these states more fully into the broader national goal of Viksit Bharat @2047.

The Governor also noted the strategic location of both states along India’s international borders and their relevance to the Act East Policy. Referring to the recent opening of the Bairabi-Sairang Railway Line, he said the new rail link has improved internal connectivity in Mizoram and contributed to growth in tourism and economic activity. The Governor recalled that Mizoram is recognised as India’s first fully literate state and has been designated the “Ginger Capital of India” in view of its significant ginger production. He described Arunachal Pradesh as the “Land of the Rising Sun” and pointed to its considerable hydropower potential as well as its growing reputation in kiwi fruit cultivation.

The event was presided by Pi Lalhruaitluangi, Additional Private Secretary to the Governor, who outlined the purpose of the programme. A video message from Arunachal Pradesh Governor Lt Gen KT Parnaik, PVSM, UYSM, YSM (Retd), was screened for the attendees. Dr. Jenifer Lalbiakdiki, Principal of Government T. Romana College, and Ms Api Hiba, a scholar from Mizoram University and President of the Arunachal Student Union, Mizoram, delivered brief presentations on the history and significance of both states.

A captivating tourism video showcasing the heritage and attractions of Mizoram and Arunachal Pradesh was screened, followed by vibrant cultural performances featuring traditional Mizo and Arunachali dances presented by students from the Regional Institute of Paramedical and Nursing Sciences (RIPANS) and Government T. Romana College, adding richness and vibrancy to the occasion. The programme concluded with the Governor interacting informally with participants at the Lok Bhavan's Upper Lawn, fostering a joyful and engaging atmosphere.

Under the North-East Areas (Reorganisation) Act, 1971, Mizoram was established as a Union Territory in 1972. It attained full statehood as India's 23rd state through the 53rd Constitutional Amendment Act in 1986, effective from February 20, 1987. Arunachal Pradesh, formerly known as the North-East Frontier Agency (NEFA), was reorganized as a Union Territory in 1972. It became India's 24th state on February 20, 1987, following the 55th Constitutional Amendment Act, 1986.

The 'Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat' programme, launched by the Government of India, seeks to promote stronger bonds and mutual understanding among the diverse peoples, cultures, and traditions of India's States and Union Territories. As part of this initiative, Lok Bhavan in Mizoram has been organizing Foundation Day celebrations for various paired States and UTs since June 2023, under the leadership of the Governor.

Attachment

title: LOK BHAVAN-AH MIZORAM LEH ARUNACHAL PRADESH-TE DINCHAMPHAPHAK LAWM A NI
content:
4588/2025-2026

Aizawl, the 24th February, 2026:Vawiin khan 'Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat' hmalakna hnuaiah Mizoram Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh, PVSM, AVSM, YSM (Retd) hovin Mizoram leh Arunachal Pradesh-te State puitlinga hlankai champhaphak lawmna Durbar Hall, Lok Bhavan, Aizawlah hman a ni.

Larsap General (Dr) Vijay Kumar Singh chuan state pahnih mipuite duhsakna hlanin, state puitlinga hlankai an nih hnuah Mizoram leh Arunachal Pradesh te'n hmasawnna kawng chak taka an zawh thu a sawi a. State pahnihte chu ram leilung leh tribal hnam ziarang hausa tak nei an nih thu sawiin, a ram leilung tlawh pawh mai harsat avang leh chhan dang dangte avangin hun engemawchen ngaihthah ni mahse, tunhnaiah nasa taka hma an sawn thu a sawi a. Thalaite atanga bul kan tan a, kawng tinrenga hmasawnna kan hnuh luh bawk chuan, India ram changkang leh intodelh 'Viksit Bharat@2047' siamnaah kan tel ve ngei dawn a ni, a ti bawk.

Larsap chuan Mizoram leh Arunachal Pradesh-te chu India ram hmun pawimawh taka awm an nih thu leh Act East Policy-ah hmun pawimawh tak an chan thu a sawi a. Bairabi-Sairang Rel kawng hawn tak chuan hmasawnna a rawn thlen mek thu leh khualzin pawh nasa taka an pun phah thu a sawi a. Mizoram chu India rama ziak leh chhiar thiam vekna state hmasa ber a nih thu sawiin, sawhthing khawpui 'Ginger Capital of India' atana puan a nih thu a sawi a. Arunachal Pradesh chu 'Land of the Rising Sun' tia hriat a nih thu sawiin, tui chakna hmanga kawlphetha siam chhuah theihna hmabak eng tak nei leh Kiwi avanga hriat hlawh a nih thu a sawi bawk.

He hun hi Pi Lalhruaitluangi, Addl. PS to Governor chuan kaihruaiin programme buatsaih chhan a sawifiah a. Arunachal Pradesh Larsap Lt Gen KT Parnaik, PVSM, UYSM, YSM (Retd) thuchah thlir ho a ni a. Dr. Jenifer Lalbiakdiki, Principal, Govt. T. Romana College leh Pi Api Hiba, MZU Scholar, President, Arunachal Student Union, Mizoram te'n state pahnih chanchin tawi an sawi a. Mizoram leh Arunachal Pradesh chanchin pholanna video tawi hmuh nawm tak thlir ho a ni bawk a. Regional Institute of Paramedical and Nursing Sciences (RIPANS) leh Govt. T. Romana College zirlaite'n Mizo leh Arunachal Pradesh hnam lam mawi tak takte an entir a. Hemi hnu hian Larsap-in hemi puala kalkhawmte Lok Bhavan Upper Lawn-ah kawmin hun hlimawm tak an hmang ho a ni.

Northeast Areas (Reorganisation) Act, 1971 hnuaiah kum 1972 khan Mizoram chu Union Territory (UT) a puan a ni a. India ram Danpui siamthat vawi 53-na 1986 hmangin India ram State 23-na ni tura hlankai a ni. Arunachal Pradesh hi North-East Frontier Agency (NEFA) tih thin niin, kum 1972 khan NEFA chu Union Territory (UT) ah hlankai a ni a. February ni 20, 1987 khan India ram Danpui siamthat vawi 55-na 1986 hmangin India ram State 24-na a ni ta a ni.

Ek Bharat Shreshtha Bharat programme hian India rama State leh UT hrang hranga cheng hnam hrang hrang, hnam ziarang leh nunphung inang lo tak takte inkara inpawhna tha zawk siam leh an inkara inhriatthiam tawnna nasa zawk siam a tum a. He programme kaltlang hian India rama State leh UT hrang hrangte dinchamphaphak Foundation Day lawmna chu Lok Bhavan, Mizoramah Larsap kaihhruaiin June, 2023 atang khan buatsaih tan a ni.

title: RAYMOND COLNEY’S ‘MAIMIZIAL’ WINS FIRST PRIZE IN THE MIZO SHORT FILM COMPETITION 2026
content:
523/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 24th February 2026:The award ceremony for the Mizo Short Film Competition 2026 organised by the I&PR Directorate in collaboration with the Mizoram Film Development Committee was held today at the Mini Theatre, Lianchhiari Run, Directorate of Information & Public Relations, Treasury Square, Aizawl. A total of 41 short films were submitted for the competition. Pu B. Lalchhanzova, Minister, IPR & PS Department, attended and presented the awards. The ceremony was conducted by Director Pi K. Vanlalsangi, and Secretary Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo presented a brief report on the short film competition.

Addressing the gathering, IPR & PS Minister Pu B. Lalchhanzova said that a good film is powerful and can influence the audience’s thoughts, guiding them toward both positive and negative directions. He emphasized that it is important not merely to produce many films, but to produce quality films. The Minister also announced that, with support from the Ministry of Information & Broadcasting, the ‘Lemchan – Mizo Film Festival’ is planned to be held in Mizoram from March 16–18 to promote the state’s film industry. He stated that it is important to make good use of this festival so that filmmaking and related activities can continue to develop as sustainable livelihoods.

He further noted that while the Mizo film industry is progressing, achieving greater success requires continuous learning and skill development, strong self-confidence, and maintaining both physical and mental health. He stressed the importance of perseverance and a mindset of “I can do it,” and said efforts should be made so that Mizo films attain the standard required to win National Awards.

The Minister also observed that when we look at critically acclaimed and commercially successful films, each film is carefully and meaningfully crafted, showing the importance of using time wisely and effectively. He congratulated all the winners of today’s short film competition organized by the I&PR Directorate and expressed hope that those who did not win would remain encouraged and motivated to continue improving.

For the Mizo Short Film Competition 2026, films of 10–15 minutes in length were accepted until 16 February 2026, and 41 entries were received. After careful evaluation by the judges, the results were announced today.

1st Prize:₹2,50,000

2nd Prize:₹1,25,000

3rd Prize:₹70,000

Five Consolation Prizes: ₹30,000 each

Winners of the Mizo Short Film Competition 2026:

1st Prize: Maimizial – Raymond Colney

2nd Prize: Zualtei Pa – H. Lalsangzela (Zote Entertainment)

3rd Prize: Nunna – Lalrohlua Renthlei (Phaidung Studio)

Consolation Prize Winners:

1. Chanchinbumi – Christo Pa

2. Noodles Soup – Margaret B. Lalmuanawmi

3. Vindicta – David Sanga

4. The Unforgiven Silence – Ruatfela Mart Khiangte

5. Thangthawvenga –  Hruaitea Hauhnar

title: Chief Secretary hovin MZU Convocation Programme hmanpuia Mizoram lo zin tur Vice President lo dawnsawndan tur thlirho
content:
4587/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl: the 24 February 2026 :Vawiin khan Mizoram Chief Secretary Pu Khilli Ram Meena hovin Chief Secretary Conference Hall, MINECO-ah, March ni 7-a MZU Convocation Programme neihna hmanpuia lo zin tur India ram Vice President C.P. Radhakrishnan lo dawnsawn dan tura ruahmanna thlirhovin thutkhawma ni.

Thutkhawmnaah hian Vice President dawngsawng tura ruahmanna kalpui tur, a kaihhnawih Department hrang hrang: PWD Department, PHE leh P&E bakah Home Department leh DDK leh AIR aiawh, etc  hotute an tel a. Mawhphurhna nei Deparmtnet ten hmalakna an kalpui tawh ang theuhte an thlirho va, a tul anga ruahmanna siam that ngaite an ngaihtuah nghal bawk a ni.

title: ZMC&H-IN SAHUANAH NI KHAT AWH COMMUNITY OUTREACH PROGRAMME AN BUATSAIH
content:
4586/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 24th February, 2026:Vawiin khan Zoram Medical College and Hospital hnuaia Department of Microbiology leh Department of Community Medicine buaihsaihin One Day Community Outreach Programme chu Aizawl Zoological Park, Sakawrtuichhunah hman a ni a. He hunah hian Zoonotic Disease chungchang sawihona leh a inkaichhawn theih dan te leh harsatna an neih te sawiho a ni a. A hmuna thawkte pawh an thisen laksak niin, Zoonotic natna te a thlawnin test sak an ni. He hun hi Pu MZ Singson, Chief Wildlife Warden bakah RO leh staff-in an hmanpui a ni.

title: RAYMOND COLNEY SIAM, 'MAIMIZIAL' CHUAN MIZO SHORT FILM COMPETITION 2026 LAWMMAN PAKHATNA A DAWNG
content:
4585/2025-2026

Aizawl dated 24th February 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Mini Theatre, Lianchhiari Run, Directorate of Information & Public Relations, Treasury Square, Aizawlah I&PR leh Mizoram Film Development Committee bultuma buatsaih, film tawi siam inelna hmawrbawkna hun hman a ni a. He inelnaah hian Film tawi 41 thehluh niin vawiin khan Pu B.Lalchhanzova, Minister, IPR & PS chuan lawmman semna hun a hmanpui a. Pi K.Vanlalsangi, Director chuan lawmman semna hun hi kaihruaiin Pi Betsy Zothanpari Sailo, Secretary chuan Film tawi hmanga inelna chungchang report tawi a pe.

IPR&PS Minister Pu B.Lalchhanzova chuan Film tha chu thil tithei tak, a thlirtu ngaihtuahna, a tha zawng leh tha lo zawnga hruai kawi thei a nih thu a sawi a. Film siam chhuah tam satliah ni lovin, Film tha siam chhuah thiam a pawimawh thu a sawi. Minister chuan I&B Ministry atangin, Mizorama Film lama tui mite tihhmasawnna turin ‘Lemchan- Mizo Film Festival’ tih chu March ni 16 -18 chhung buatsaih tum a nih thu a tarlang a. Film siam leh a khaihhnawih hrang hrangte, eizawnnatlaka kan siam zel theih nan he Festival hi tangkai taka kan hman thiam a pawimawh thu a sawi. Mizo Film Industry chuan hmasawnna a hmuh mek rualin, Film Industry-a hlawhtlinna sang zawk chang tur hian zirna leh thiamna kawngah mahni intuaihriam rengte, mahni inrintawkna tha tak neih te, taksa leh rilru hrisel neihte a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Beidawng duh loa, ‘Ka tithei ve a ni’ tih rilruput tlat a pawimawh thu sawiin Mizo Film-te hi National Award dawng tlak a siam ve turin tan lak a tul thu a sawi.

IPR&PS Minister chuan Film ngaihhlut hlawh tak takte, hlawhtlinna leh chawimawina dawngte han chik hian, an Film siam second tin hi awmze nei takin an duan thin thu a sawi a. Hei hian hun hman dik leh hun hman thiam pawimawh zia a tarlan thu a sawi a. Vawiina I&PR Directorate bultuma Film tawi inelnaa lawmman dawng zawng zawngte chu a lawmpui thu sawiin lawmman la ve lo te pawhin hmasawn zel tura chona leh phurna an hawn theuh a beisei thu a sawi bawk a ni.

Mizo Short Film Competition 2026 atan hian February ni 16, 2026 thleng khan minute 10-15 a sei, Film 41 a lut a. Judge-ten uluk taka an endik hnuah vawiin khan result hi puan a ni a. Pakhatna lawmman hian cheng 2,50,000 , Pahnihna lawmman hian cheng 1,25,000 leh Pathumna lawmman hian cheng 70,000 a keng tel a. Consolation Prize mi panga tan cheng 30,000 theuh a tel bawk a ni.

Mizo Short Film Competition 2026 lawmman dawngtute chu;1st Prize -Maimizial–Raymond Colney2nd Prize- Zualtei Pa - H.Lalsangzela (Zote Entertainment)3rd Prize- Nunna - Lalrohlua Renthlei (Phaidung Studio)

Consolation Prize dawngtute1. Chanchinbumi Christo Pa2. Noodles soup Margaret B.Lalmuanawmi3. Vindicta David Sanga4. The Unforgiven Silence Ruatfela Mart Khiangte5. Thangthawvenga Hruaitea Hauhnar

title: Mizoram Agricultural Marketing Board (MAMB) chuan Mizoram hmar lam District 7 te tan inrawnkhawmna hun, 'consultative meeting on thlai thar market' a buatsaih
content:
4584/2025-2026

Aizawl; the 24th February, 2026:Vawiin khan MAMB chuan Mizoram hmar lam district 7:Aizawl,Serchhip,Champhai,Kolasib,Mamit,Khawzawl leh Saitual district-a District Agricultural Marketing Committee (DAMC) member te, Secondary Collection Centre(SSC) puipa te leh Society hruaitute te tan inrawnkhawmna hun, 'consulative meeting on thlai thar market'  chu I &WR Auditorium, MINECO-ah a buatsaih.

Vawiin inrawnkhawmna meeting hi Pi Ramdinliani, Secretary, A&FW Dept. & Member Secretary, MAMB chuan kaihhruaiin, Dr.KC Lalmalsawmzauva,Adviser to CM (HHP) & Co-Chairman, MAMB chuan consultative meeting khuhhawnna hun hmangin, PPT hmangin thlai thar lei leh hralh chungchanga Sawrkar thiltum ( Visions and Objectives)  kalkhawmte hrilhhriatna hun a hmang bawk.

Dr.Lalmalsawmzauva chuan MAMB in sawhthing rate a siamna chhan sawiin,  nikum lamah DAMC/SCC kutah kan dah a, an hralh hman lo hlau khan an intih hniam siak ta vak mai a, sumdawng lam an fing si a, an duh ang angin min chingkual a, chuvangin MAMB  chuan India rama Mandi hrang hrang sawhthing rate en chungin, Buyer leh Seller tana hlawk ve ve turin rate rawn khaikhawm ta a ni. MAMB in Sawhthing rate a siam hi sawrkar sum ren vang emaw, a sen hreh vang a ni ngawt lo, Sumdawng ten duh duha a rate min control hi tih bo kan duh vang a ni, a ti.

Pu Lalhmingmuana, Managing Director, MAMB  chuan Secondary Collection Centre  (SCC) kalpui dan tur leh enkawl dan tur Standard  Operating  Procedures(SOP) for SCC sawifiahna hun a hmang.

Vawiin inrawnkhawmna-ah hian  sawhthing rate (Reserved Price) siam dan turte leh Thlai thar lei leh hralh kaihhnawih thil pawimawh hrang hrang khunkhan taka sawiho  a ni hnuah Pu Zohmingthanga, Member, MAMB chuan vote of thanks sawiin hun a khar ta  a ni.

Attachment

title: Govt Serchhip College ah mock drill neih a ni
content:
4583/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 24th February, 2026:Vawiin khan National Disaster Response Force (NDRF) kaihhruaiin Govt. Serchhip College ah earthquake (lirnghing) mock drill neih a ni a. Lirnghing a thlen thulha chet lak dan tur an zir a ni.

Mock Drill hi chawhnu dar 2 ah tan a ni a. Staging Area atan Serchhip DC Pisapui hman a ni a. Govt. Serchhip College Administrative building chu lirnghingin a sawichhia anga lemchan niin zirlai naupang te zingah hliam tuar te first aid pek an ni a; hliam na tak tuar te chu ambulance hmangin District Hospital-ah phurh phei an ni. NDRF te hian College tualzawlah Puan In kaihin makeshift hospital an siam a. District Hospital atangin medical mi thiam ten an buaipui a ni.

PHE department a thawktuten tui pipe chhia an siam a, Power & Electricity Department ten electric hruipui chhia an siam a. Fire Department ten fire tender thawhchhuah puiin kang an thelh bawk a ni.

Vawiin mock drill ah hian NDRF, Police, Fire & Emergency Services, BSF, Aapda Mitra, PHE, P&E, Health Department leh Govt Serchhip College zirlai leh zirtirtute an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: Serchhip DC in Leng khua tlawhin VVP II hmanga hmasawnna hna thawh dan tur a hmunah a en
content:
4582/2025-2026

Dated Serchhip, the 24th February, 2026:Serchhip DC Pu Paul L Khuma chuan vawiin khan Leng Khua a tlawh a. Vibrant Villages Programme II (VVP II)-a khaw thlan Leng khuaa Village Action Plan a thun tur ngaihtuahin khawtlang hruaitute nen Leng VC House ah an thukhawm a ni.

Vawiin thutkhawmah hian Leng khuaa Village Action Plan siampui turin DC bakah line department te, VC te leh tlawmngai pawl te an tel a. Department leh Village Council te chuan khaw chhung hmasawnna proposal an lo thehlut tawh a. Vawiin hian DC leh a team te hian a hmunah an enpui a, Leng khaw hmasawnna tura mamawh dangte an sawipui nghal bawk a ni. An rawtna thehluh zingah hian Community Hall sak te, Leng to Zuva inkar kawng siam te, tui dahkhawlna tur Tanky lian siam te, sub-centre leh school cheithat te leh thildangte a tel a. Heng an rawtna hrang hrangte hi District Committee chuan a enzui leh dawn a ni.

Virbrant Village Programme (VVP)-II kalpuina atan hian Mizorama RD Block 16 atangin, thingtlang khaw 109-te chu Ministry of Home Affairs-in a thlang a. Serchhip District ah chuan Serchhip RD Block hnuaiah Keitum khua; East Lungdar RD Block hnuaiah Mualcheng, Lungkawlh, Bawktlang, North Vanlaiphai, Leng leh Sailulak te a huam a ni.

India-Myanmar leh India-Bangladesh ramri khuate huam turin Vibrant Village Programme II hi kum 2024 atang khan kalpui tan niin Serchhip District chhunga khaw sarih (7)-te hi a huam tel ta a. Central Sector Scheme a nih angin funding hi sawrkar laipuiin 100% a tum dawn a ni. Sawrkar laipui scheme kalpui mek sa te nen a theih chin chinah kaihkawp (converge) tur a ni a. Convergence a rem lo a nih chuan, MHA level ah endik leh tur a ni.

Attachment

title: DISTRICT AIDS PREVENTION CONTROL COMMITTEE (DAPCC) THUTKHAWM NEIH A NI
content:
4581/2025-2026

Lawngtlai the 24th Febuaru, 2026 :Vawiin chawhnu dar 1:00pm khan DC Conference Hall, Lawngtlai ah Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga kaihhruainna in District Aids Prevention Control Committee thutkhawnna neih ni.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan member kalkhawmte hnenah lawmthu a sawi a. Engtiang chiah hian nge AIDS hian Lawngtlai district min luah a, kan district hi eng din hmun ah chiah nge kan din tih kan thlirho in kan ngaithla a, Moderate Level ah kan awm mek hi a lawmwm hle a ni, a ti. Thawktute inpeknaah lawmthu sawiin, tan la zual leh sauh sauh turin a chah a. HIV/ AIDS do kawngah NGO leh VC te nen pawh a thawhho thiam a ngai hle a ni tiin, thisen test pawimawh zia inzirtir a, awareness kan neih tam a pawimawh hle a ti a. NGO leh Kohhran huang chhungah pawh awareness kan neih tam a ngai a, tanpui kan ngaihna leh mamawh kan neih te theih ang ang a in puih tawnin thawh ho zel dawn a ni a ti bawk.

DAPCC meeting ah hian report ngaihthlak niin, 2004 - January, 2026 a ICTC a HIV Screened 27,775 ( Mipa-11,321 & Hmeichhia-16,454) atangin 678 HIV Positive niin, April 2025- january 2026 chhung hian 1621 HIV Screened atangin 51 HIV Positive hmuh niin, an kaina tlangpui chu - sexual contact -29 (Regular Partner/Spouse-13, casual/non-commercial, Non-regular Partner-16), Homosexual -1, syringe/needle thianghlim lo-19, Nu leh Pa atanga kai-2. Tun dinhmun ah ART Centre a in register zat hi -663 an ni a, Aril 2025- January 2026 a in register zat- 60 niin tun dinhmunah alive on ART hi 541 an ni mek a ni.

Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan thawktute inpekna leh report felfai tak ngaihthlak a ni chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, thutkhawm hi a khar a ni.

Attachment

title: APEX BANK, Falkawn Branch hawn a ni
content:
4580/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl: the 24 February, 2026 :Vawiin khan Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. Branch 35-na Falkawn Branch chu Pu Lalnunsanga, Chairman, Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. in a hawng.

Falkawn Branch hawnna hun hi Pu A. Lallungmuana CEO, Mizoram Cooperative Apex Bank Ltd. chuan kaihruaiin, Kal khawmte hmaah Apex Bank chuan Falkawn khua chauh nilovin a tlangdunga khaw hrang hrang; Hualngohmun, Melriat, Kelsih leh Muallungthu leh a dangte tana dawr theih tur Bank ngelnghet leh dawr nuam din an tum thu a sawi a. Apex Bank chu Mizo mipui hriatthiam dan leh nunphung mila kal tlat a nih thu a sawi bawk.

Mizoram chhunga Federation hrang hrang Chairman te’ chuan vawiina Bank hawnna hi an hmanpui a. Pu K. Rothangpuia, Mizofed Chairman chuan kal khawmte hmaah Falkawn khua leh a chhehvel te an vanneih thu sawiin mipuiin thiam taka Bank an hman phawt chuan hmasawnna rualkhai tak a thlen ngei a beisei thu a sawi.

He hunah hian Falkawn VCP Pu H. Zarmawia pawhin  thusawiin,  Mizo Bank ngei Falkawna hawn a ni chu lawmthu sawiin theih tawp chhuaha mipuite pawhin Bank leh ATM te hmang tangkai tura tan an lo lak tur thu a sawi bawk a. Pi TBC Lalkhumtiri, Deputy General Manager-chuan kalkhawmte hmaah lawmthu sawiin hun hi a khar  a ni.

Attachment

title: SIAHA DISTRICT-A DAN KENGKAWHTUTE TÁN NI KHAT AWH PROHIBITION OF ELECTRONIC CIGARETTES ACT, 2019 ZIRHONA NEIH A NI
content:
4579/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 24, February 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00A.M khân Siaha Police Station Conference Hall, Council Vaih, Siahaah dan kengkawhtute tán ni khat awh Prohibition of Electronic Cigarettes Act, 2019 zirhona neih a ni a, Dr. Zoramthangi Renthlei, State Nodal Officer, National Tobacco Control Programme chuan a hmanpui.

Thu sawiin Dr. Zoramthangi Renthlei chuan "India ram hi zuk leh hmuam uar ram kan ni a, state hrang hrang zingah Mizoram hi zuk leh hmuam tinasa tehnaah pahnihna kan ni mêk a, chuvangin kan dinhmun aṭanga dinhmun ṭha zawka ding turin sawrkar leh a thawktute pawhin nasa takin ṭan an la a, mipui, tlawmngai pawl leh kohhran nen ṭanrual a ngai a ni,” a ti.

Zuk leh hmuam ti lo zingah natna hlauhawm tak tak vei an awm ṭhin tih chu an hriat thu Dr. Zoramthangi Renthlei hian sawiin, “Mihring hi vannei, vanduai leh laihawl kan awm a. A laihawl hi mi nawlpui kan ni a, kan ei leh in leh nunphung avangin vannei huanga awm thei leh vanduaina tawng thei kan ni a, chuvangin invenna leh fimkhurna hi kan kalpui reng a ngai a ni,” a ti.

Zuk leh hmuama fihlim lo, nghei harsa titakte hi chhuan lo la awm tûrte tana palai hna thawktu pawimawh tâk an nih theih thu State Nodal Officer, National Tobacco Control Programme hian sawiin, ‘Zirlai naupang leh ṭhangtharte hian tunlaina emaw tiin zuk leh hmuam tih hi an intihhmuh chho em em a, E-cigarettes (vapes) bur mawi tak tak; mit la taka siamte hi a hlauhawm loh bik lo a, mi zingah inthlahrunna nei miah lohva awrh hial an awmte hi a pawi em em a. Sports department-in 'Catch them young' an kalpui ang hian National Tobacco Control Programme pawh hian naupang zawkte hi tihchhinna aṭanga a bawiha an luh lohna turin ṭan nasa takin a la a, zirna inah leh Sunday school-ah te inzirtirna nasa taka kalpui a ni,” a ti.

Dr. Zoramthangi Renthlei chuan chhungkua, khawtlâng leh ram sum leh pai dinhmun thlengin vaihlo hian a nghawng tih sawiin, “Vaihlo kg 1 hi zawrh tura an siam nân hian thing leh mau kg 8 an hmang ṭhin a. Non communicable diseases natna hrang hrang thlentu langsar bêr chu vaihhlo a ni a, kan damlohin inenkawlna sum leh pai tam tak sen a lo ngai a, chhungkaw sum leh sawrkar sum nasa tak kan seng ṭhin a ni. Zuk leh hmuam hi kan sim thei lo anih pawhin tih phal lohna hmun kan zah tur a ni” a ti. Nikum aṭangin Mizoramin mikhual kan thleng nasa a, an sawi lar bêr chu "Mizo zingah meizu kan tam lutuk te, mipui tana lirthei khalhtu ṭhenkhatin lirthei chhungah mei an zu hi a ni a, kan ram mawina kan larpui rual hian zuk leh hmuam kan tinasa hi kan hmingchhiatpui lo vang tih a sawi theih miah loh,” a ti bawk.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Siaha district enforcement force bakah health department official leh MJA an tel a. Pu Vanlalpeka, SDPO, Siaha-in hun a kaihruai a, Pi Vanlalzari, State Legal Consultant, NTCP in Prohibition of Electronic Cigarettes Act, 2019 leh Cigarettes and Other Tobacco Products Act (COTPA), 2003 zirtirna a nei a, zawhna leh chhanna hun hman a ni bawk. Pu R. Lalremruata, State Consultant, NTCP-chuan ‘Mizoram mipui zaa 58 chu zuk leh hmuam laka fihlim lo kan ni’ a, a ti mekte hian sim se kan duh ber anih rualin chhuan lo la awm turte hmakhua ngaihna avangin Mizoram district headquarters zawng zawngah inzirtirna hi kalpui tum a nih thu a sawi. Dr. Lalrengpuii Ralte, CMO & DNO, NTCP Siaha chuan lawmthu sawina a nei a, hun hman tihtawp a ni.

Attachment

title: Lawngtlaiah DCC, DLRC leh DLSC for the Quarter ending December ,2025 leh Special DCC for 2025- 2026 an ṭhukhawm
content:
4578/2025-2026

Dated Lawngtlai, 24th February 2026:Vawiin chawhma dar 11:00 AM khan Lawngtlai District Consultative Committee (DCC), District Level Review Committee (DLRC) leh District Level Security Committee (DLSC) for the Quarter Ending December, 2025 chu Pu Donny Lalruatsanga Deputy Commissioner, kaihhruaiin DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhukhawm.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Bank hrang hrang aiawh lokalte hnena lawmthu sawina a nei hmasa a. Lawngtlai mipuiten an dawr nasa tih riaa, mipuite lo dawngsawng thiam fo thin turin a ngen a. A bik takin mipuiten hamthatna an neih hrang hrang an hriat zung zung theihna tur leh bank dawr kawngah harsatna an tawh lohna tura Financial Literally Campaign (FLC) ngaipawimawh thar turin a fuih a ni. Bank- te chu FLC nei ngei ngei thin tura chahin, a tul dan ang a sawrkar line department hrang hrangte nena thawkho thiam turin a chah a. Bawrhsap chuan Social Security Schemes hrang hrang- PMJDY, PMJJBY, PMSBY leh a dangte hnuaia loan pek chhuah tur target an neihte tihhlawhtling ngei turin a chah nghal bawk.

He ṭhutkhawmah hian Lead Bank Office-a Lead District Manager (Lawngtlai & Siaha) Pu JM Soren leh Reserve Bank of India (RBI) aiawh bakah, bank hrang hrang leh line department ai awhte an tel a ni.

He hunah hian meeting hmasa, December ni 12, 2025-a DCC meeting minute chu pawm a ni a. Kum 2025 chhunga Lawngtlai District-a bank hrang hrangte hna thawh thlir let niin, hmachhawp an neih leh hma lak zui dan tur te sawi ho nghal a ni.

He hunah hian Financial Unclusion Plan (FIP) hnuaiah Lawngtlai District chhunga mihring 2,000 chunglam chenna khaw tinah mipuiin bank kal tlanga hamṭhatna hrang hrang an chhawr ve theih nan an khuaah bank branch emaw, business correspondent emaw, Indian Postal Payment Bank emaw dah tura hma lakna kalpui mek a nih thu leh tun dinhmunah Lawngtlai District chhungah Bank Branch- 12, ATM Booth -8, Business correspondent- 84,Financial Literacy Centre- 1, leh Indian Postal Payment Bank-1, a awm mek thu tar lan a ni a.December 2025 thlengin bank hrang hrang, Lead Bank leh CFL kal tlangin mipui hnena sum hman leh enkawl dan inzirtirna (financial literacy campaign) ṭum- 55 buatsaih a nih thu tar lan niin, line department-te nena ṭang hovin bank-te'n FLC tam zawk buatsaih turin hma lak chhunzawm se, tih a ni.

Pawisa dah hmasa lo (zero balance)-a account hawn theihna, Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) leh social security scheme hrang hrang - Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY), Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY) etc. lama bank hma lak dan te thlir ho niin, mipui tam zawkin he'ng hamṭhatnate hi an chhawr theih nan ṭan lak lehzual ni se, tih a ni a. Bank-a mipuiin sum an dah luh (deposit) zat za zela bank-in mipuia sum an puktir (credit) zat chhutna, Credit/Deposit Ratio-ah Lawngtlai District-a bank-te chuan December 2025-ah CD Ratio 121.59% an nei tih tar lan a ni a, September 2025 (115. 78%) nen khaikhinin CD Ratio hi 5.81%-in a pung a ni.

Kum 2025-2026 sawrkar kum chhunga Lawngtlai District chhunga bank-te'n loan an pek chhuah dan tur, Annual Credit Plan (ACP) ruahman atangin Decenber,2025 thleng khan bank-te hian Priority Sector hnuaiah 73.99% leh Non- Proirity Sector hnuaiah 229.25 % loan an pe chhuak tawh a ni. Ni 31, December, 2025 thleng khan PMEGP hnuaiah loan nuai 42.83 hu pek niin, NRLM - ah nuai 106, PMMY - ah nuai 467.81 leh KCC loan nuai 1578.64 hu pek chhuah a ni a.

He hunah hian kum 2025-2026 chhunga Lawngtlai District chhunga bank-te'n loan an pek chhuah dan tur, Annual Credit Plan (ACP) ruahmanna an neih chu chu thlir ho a ni a. Bank leh mipui sum vawn himna (security) lam te leh pawisa leng vel (currency management & remittance) chungchang bakah Bank zawng zawngten quarter tawp atanga ni 15 chhung ngei a FLC data submit ni se tih an rel  a. Bank Branch zawng zawnga awm ngei ngei tur - Security Guards,  CCTV, Fire Extinguisher leh Security Alarm- te chu ngaihpawimawh thar ni se an ti bawk.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP LEH CEM LADC- TE INKAWM
content:
4577/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 24th February 2026:Vawiin khan Lawngtlai Bawrhsap Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan CEM, LADC Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chu a Office Chamber-ah tlawhin Lawngtlai District hmasawnna tur kawng hrang hrang a sawipui.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Lawngtlai District-hmasawn nan LADC leh District Administration pheikhairual taka kal a pawimawh hle tih a sawi a. Hemi kawngah hian harsatna te in hrilh tlang a, hmalam pana ke pen tlan a tul hle a ni, a ti. LADC - ah sawrkar mumal tak a awm thei chu lawmawm a tih thu tarlangin Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan hmalam hunah tha taka thawhhona a awm a beisei tih a sawi bawk.

Pu C. Lalsawmzuala chuan DC - in a lo tlawh chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi a. LADC leh District Administration - thawhhona chu thil pawimawh tak a ni a ti a. Lawngtlai District hmasawnna turin mahni thuneihna zawnah chak tak hmalak tlan a duh thu a tarlang a.CEM chuan Lawngtlai District- mipuite tha taka sawrkar tawiawm zel turin a sawm nghal bawk a ni.

Vawiin DC leh CEM inkawmnaah hian thu pawimawh tak tak sawidun a ni a. Faina leh thianghlimna kawngah leh khawpui cheimawi kawngah hmalak a ngai hle an ti a, hemi kawngah hian theihtawpa thawhho ni se an ti a. Motor parking leh traffic chungchaah hmalakna tha zawk awm se tih a ni a, ruahmanna siam ho ni se an ti a ni. Ran khuahkhirh kawngah hmasawnna tur tam tak a la awm tih pawm tlangin, khauh zawka dan leh thupek kenkawh ni se an ti a ni. Foreigner- lo lut thin leh sumdawnna kalpui chungchangah inkhuahkhirhna tha zawk bakah SOP mumal taka siama chak zawka hmalak ni se an ti a ni. Hemi kawngah hian FMR chu khauh taka kenkawh ni se an ti a ni.

DC leh CEM inkawmnaah hian Executive Secretary, LADC, Transport Officer, LADC, Sanitation & Waste Management Officer, LADC leh MJA aiawhte an tel thei a ni.

title: DINTHAR KAWN  ATANGA EBENEZER HOSPITAL PANNA KAWNG KHAR/BLOCK CHUNGCHANGA AIZAWL SP THUCHHUAH
content:
4576/2025-2026

Aizawl the 24th February, 2026 :Mizoram State Sorkar Notification No.B.12021/10/04-TRP Dt.22.8.2008 leh Section 115 of MV Act, 1988-in thuneihna min pek ang leh Sub-Divisional Officer, PWD, Aizawl Road South Sub-Division-III ngenna angin, Pu C. Vanlalvena, Superintendent of Police, Traffic, Aizawl chuan a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek a chhuah.

PWD, Aizawl Road South Sub-Division-III chuan Dinthar kawn – Ebenezer Hospital panna kawng (Siakeng Driving School kual) siamthat hna an thawh dawn avangin a hnuaia tarlan ang hian helai kawngkhar/blocka ni dawn tih mipuite kan inhriattir e.

title: Champhai District Level Road Safety Committee thukhawm
content:
4575/2025-2026

Champhai, dated 24th February 2026:Nimin khan Champhai DC Conference Hall-ah Champhai District Level Road Safety Committee chu an Chairman, Bawrhsap Pu Mohammad Aaquib hoin an thukhawm a. District chhunga kawngpui hrang hrang dinhmun leh kawngpui hmangtute himna tur hrang hrang an thlirho.

He huna tarlan danin PWD hnuaiah kawng pathum - District Hospital - DC Office (nuai 62.64), Bethel Kawn - DFO (Eastern Circle) Office (nuai 14.42) leh Awmpui Phei - Vety Office (nuai 18.30) siam thatna turin tender chhuah a ni tawh a, tender te hi karleh thawhlehni ( March ni 3, 2026) ah hawn tur niin, hnathawh tan thuai beisei a ni a. Hei bakah hian SASCI hnuaiah cheng vaibelchhe 6 hmangin DK Point - District Hospital, Dawrkaikawn - Agriculture Department, PHE Road, Bethel Road - SP Bangla Junction, Vengthlang YMA Run - Govt Champhai College, Selluaia Point - Govt Champhai College, Chalchung Run - Vaihmun, Darthangvunga Point - NH -06 (via Saron Veng) siam tha turin ruahmanna a awm mek thu te, SASCI hnuaiah vek cheng vaibelchhe li Champhai khawchhung kawng thawmṭhatna tur hmuh beisei a nih thu leh Champhai- Tlangsam kawng siamṭhat nan cheng vaibelchhe 11.55 ruahman a nih thu tarlan a ni bawk.

NHIDCL te enkawl kawngpui chungchang te pawh sawiho niin, tun dinhmunah NH-06 thawmthat hna Khawzawl District lam atangin bul an ṭan mek thu an tarlang a. Hei bakah hian National Highway hlui (Chhungte- Tuipui Road) siamṭhatna tur cheng vaibelchhe 50 bawr vel ruahmanna an thehluh chu, thuneitu ten en tha tura an tih angin, ruahmanna hi an siam ṭhat hnuah an thehlut leh tawh bawk a ni.

Hei bakah hian PWD Highway Division te enkawl lai Champhai Kanan Junction-Zokhawthar siamṭhatna tur pawisa pawh Ministry of Road Transport & Highway in a pawmpui tawh thu tarlan a ni bawk.

Ṭhutkhawm thurel angin Champhai District chhunga kawngpui hrang hrang te thawm ṭhat enfiah turin - SDO(Sadar) kaihhruaina hnuaiah SP, PWD, Sub Headquarters YMA, DTO leh a paltlang khua/veng VC te telna District Level Road Monitoring Committee din turin ruahmanna siam a ni bawk. Hit and Run case chungchanga mipuite dikna chanvo zau zawka District mipui ten an hriat theih nan DIPRO leh DC Office ten ruahmanna an siam bawk ang.

He hunah hian Addl SP, Sr. EE PWD bakah NHIDCL, CMO , Sub Hqrs YMA leh DTO aiawh te an tel a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAMA A HMASA BER TURIN LAPAROSCOPY HMANGA PANCREAS CANCER ZAI A NI
content:
4574/2025-2026

February ni 24, 2026:Zoram Medical College and Hospital, Falkawn ah Ril leh Pum lam (Gastroenterology) zir hona leh Surgical Workshop chu nimin (February ni 24, 2026) khan neih a ni a. He workshop hi Department of Surgery, ZMC&H leh Association of Surgeons of Mizoram te ṭang hoa buatsaih niin, Mizoram-a a hmasa ber turin Pancreas Cancer chu Verh (Laparoscopy) in zai a ni.

He Gastroenterology zirhona ah hian Manipal Hospital, Salt Lake, Kolkata atanga lo kal Doctor tan Pancreas Cancer hi an khawih a. Dr. Benjamine Khiangte, Medical Gastroenterologist (Gastro & Liver Clinic) nen ṭang hoin Endoscopic Ultrasound (EUS) chu a mamawh damlo mi pariat tan a thlawn veka tihsak an ni bawk. EUS hi sawrkar hospital ah Mizoram ah kalpui vawikhatna a ni bawk. ZMC&H doctor-te chuan EUS khawl chu khawl tangkai tak a nih thu leh Mizoram pawna damlo thenkhat refer ngaih chhan a la nih avangin mipui tam zawk banphaka sawrkar hospitala neih ve theih hunah chuan harsatna tam tak a sutkian ngei an beisei thu an sawi.

He hun hi Prof. Zoramthara Zadeng, Director te, Prof Lalnunmawii Sailo, Medical Superintendent leh Prof C.  Vanlalhlua (Sub Dean, Hospital) ten telpuiin, Manipal Hospital lam atanga mikhual te lawmna thu a sawi a. MUHCS hnuaiah damlo ten man chawi lovin engkim an tih theih phah thu a sawi bawk.

Workshop hi zan lamah CME (Seminar) in a chhunzawm a. He hunah hian Gastroenterology lama hmasawnna leh Mizoram hmachhawp te sawihoin, he hun hi Dr. Samuel Lalhruaizela, Associate Professor chuan a kaihruai a. Prof. John Lalliandinga HOD, Dept of Surgery ZMCH chuan kalkhawmte lawmna thu sawiin, Mizoram Surgeon hrang hrangte leh ZMCH lama doctor hrang hrangin an telpui a ni.

Attachment

title: Notification regarding transfer and posting of officers
